title: Phymatosorus revolutus
taxonomy: Phymatosorus revolutus is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Phymatosorus and is a type of epiphytic fern. This classification places it within the larger division of Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns and fern allies. Phymatosorus revolutus is a member of the order Polypodiales, a group of ferns characterized by their often complex leaf venation. It is also part of the subclass Polypodiidae, which includes many species of epiphytic and terrestrial ferns.
